events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario is about fireblocking and draftstopping in a residential job. The observed condition is "unblocked soffits" at rough-complete stage. IRC R302 requires fireblocking at soffits to prevent fire spread through concealed spaces. Unblocked soffits are a fire safety defect.
